{{Infobox character
| name = Akura Douji
| aliases = Douji
| appears_in = Cradle
| abilities = lightning artist
| affiliations = Akura clan
| introduced = Wintersteel
}}

== Overview ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|[[Akura]] Douji is a member of the [[Akura clan]] and a practitioner of lightning-based [[madra]]. Within their combat structures, Douji has trained extensively alongside [[Grace]] and is frequently paired with them for assignments. During large-scale conflicts, Douji has been observed operating alongside [[Akura Courage]].}}

== Wintersteel ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Akura Douji]] is a lightning artist.<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c10">''Wintersteel'', chapter 10</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|Douji is a cousin of [[Grace]] and [[Courage]].<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c27">''Wintersteel'', chapter 27</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Akura Douji]] shot up the stairs.<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c27" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|The purple lightning spirit was [[Akura Douji]]’s [[Remnant]].<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c27" />}}

== Bloodline ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|[[Akura Douji]] is a deceased member of the [[Akura clan]].<ref name="cradle-09-bloodline-c3">''Bloodline'', chapter 3</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Cradle nav}}

[[Category:Characters]]
[[Category:Wintersteel]]
[[Category:Bloodline]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle characters]]
